inputs.srepr: Mul(Pow(Symbol('R', positive=True), Integer(-4)), Symbol('zeta0', positive=True), Pow(Add(Pow(Symbol('R', positive=True), Integer(2)), Mul(Integer(-1), Pow(Symbol('r', positive=True), Integer(2)))), Integer(2)))

scope: toy compact zeta profile (1 - r^2/R^2)^2; not a general boundary theorem
